cs:art2:sections.heading: Overview
cs:art2:sections.body:
Inspired by my passion for toy design, Emoti Pets is a playful and interactive toy created to help children express their emotions. This concept emerged from observing my younger siblings and conducting interviews with parents of young children, leading to the development of stuffed toys that promote emotional awareness and open communication, supported by thoughtful branding.

From crafting the toy characters to designing cohesive packaging, my goal was to bring Emoti Pets to life as a brand that fosters joy, connection, and a fun approach to exploring emotions for children.

cs:art2:sections.heading: Mood Board
cs:art2:sections.body: Soft textures, playful characters, and expressive designs helped shape the visual direction, creating a world where kids can feel comfortable exploring their emotions.

cs:art2:sections.heading: Form Development
cs:art2:sections.body: After interviewing 10–15 children between the ages of 5 and 10, I identified common ways they communicated feelings and used those findings to create more relatable and expressive character designs.

cs:art2:hero.title: Emoti Pets
cs:art2:hero.sub: Giving emotions room to be felt
